thesis_profile.market_mechanism: v91 baseline (xs_minimal_v6 9-factor IC-pruned z-score combination) overlaid with portfolio-level position multiplier driven by BTC+ETH DVOL regime. Multiplier formula 'btc_eth_max_iv_aggressive_tanh_v1' (registered in multiplier_overlay.py): clip(1 - tanh((max(btc_dvol_z90, eth_dvol_z90) - 0.5) * 3), 0.2, 1.0); applied to raw_target_weights before turnover scaling in execution_backtest._cross_sectional_period. Overlay selection from BTC options spike (2026-04-28, artifacts/quant_research/shadow_oos/btc_options_spike_2026-04-26.json): m7 picked from 10 multiplier formulae because (a) in-sample worst-quarter sharpe delta = +0.664 STRONG, (b) ETH DVOL adds +0.128 marginal value vs BTC alone (m5 +0.536 -> m7 +0.664), (c) reverse-split holdout confirmed multiplier idles in calm regimes (no harm). DVOL data: Deribit free public endpoint, synced via scripts/quant_research/sync_deribit_dvol_history.py to artifacts/external_market_data/deribit_dvol/. v91 baseline factor weights kept unchanged; overlay is pure portfolio-level sizing modulator and does NOT alter per-asset cross-section ranking (mathematically: scaling all weights uniformly preserves percentile_rank). Selection-bias-adjusted OOS estimate of overlay delta: +0.40 to +0.50 worst-quarter sharpe; production cycle 32-window walk-forward is the gold-standard validation.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-3 liquid perp-covered names by v91 9-factor z-score combo, then scale all positions by DVOL regime multiplier (in [0.2, 1.0]). Calibrated expectations after 2026-04-26 cycle validation: rank IC ~0.165 (multiplier preserves cross-section ranking, confirmed flat), WF median sharpe ~0.80 (~5% regression vs v91 0.846 is the deliberate upside-cap cost of regime throttle), worst regime sharpe ~-2.7 to -2.8 (improvement of +0.3 from v91 -3.08, matches spike forward-test estimate +0.40-0.50 after selection-bias discount). v93 ACCEPTED as baseline based on these calibrated expectations: WF sharpe trade-off is the deliberate cost of risk reduction. Cycle 2026-04-26 confirmed: max drawdown halved 41.8% -> 22.4%, max trade participation cut 67% from 0.033 to 0.011, net return improved +17pp from -27% to -9.8%. Falsification triggers rollback ONLY if: rank IC < 0.155 (signal degradation), OR WF median sharpe < 0.75 (multiplier hurts more than helps), OR worst regime sharpe < -2.9 (regime modulation backfires). Strict validation gates (validation_contract.json) remain unchanged; v93 still flags 'fail' on participation cap (0.011 > strict cap 0.005) and net-return-negative tests, same as v91 baseline. Strict pass requires Roadmap Phase 2 (portfolio construction with risk model + capacity-aware sizing).
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_60) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.18*z(dh_60) +0.15*z(dh_5) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi); final = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); position_multiplier_overlay = clip(1 - tanh((max(btc_dvol_z90, eth_dvol_z90) - 0.5) * 3), 0.2, 1.0) applied at portfolio sizing layer (not in raw_score)
